Bash(node -e "const en = require\(''./src/messages/en.json''\); const ar = require\(''./src/messages/ar.json''\); const enNav = en.sidebar.nav || {}; const arNav = ar.sidebar.nav || {}; const missing = Object.keys\(enNav\).filter\(function\(k\){ return !arNav[k]; }\); console.log\(''Missing ar.sidebar.nav:'', missing\); console.log\(''ar member:'', ar.sidebar.member\); console.log\(''ar members:'', ar.sidebar.members\); console.log\(''ar signOut:'', ar.sidebar.nav && ar.sidebar.nav.signOut\);")

Bash(node -e 'var ar = require\(""./src/messages/ar.json""\); console.log\(""signOut:"", ar.sidebar && ar.sidebar.nav && ar.sidebar.nav.signOut\); console.log\(""member:"", ar.sidebar && ar.sidebar.member\); console.log\(""members:"", ar.sidebar && ar.sidebar.members\);')

Bash(node -e 'var ar = require\(""./src/messages/ar.json""\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ar\).join\("", ""\)\); console.log\(""has app:"", !!ar.app\); console.log\(""has dashboard:"", !!ar.dashboard\); console.log\(""has settings:"", !!ar.settings\); console.log\(""has tunnels:"", !!ar.tunnels\);')

Bash(node -e 'var en = require\(""./src/messages/en.json""\); var ar = require\(""./src/messages/ar.json""\); console.log\(""EN namespaces:"", Object.keys\(en\).join\("", ""\)\); console.log\(""AR namespaces:"", Object.keys\(ar\).join\("", ""\)\); var enKeys = Object.keys\(en\); var arKeys = Object.keys\(ar\); var missingInAr = enKeys.filter\(function\(k\){ return arKeys.indexOf\(k\) === -1; }\); var missingInEn = arKeys.filter\(function\(k\){ return enKeys.indexOf\(k\) === -1; }\); console.log\(""Missing in AR:"", missingInAr.join\("", ""\) || ""none""\); console.log\(""Missing in EN:"", missingInEn.join\("", ""\) || ""none""\);')

Bash(node -e "const en = require\(''./apps/next/src/messages/en.json''\); const ar = require\(''./apps/next/src/messages/ar.json''\); const enKeys = Object.keys\(en\); const arKeys = Object.keys\(ar\); console.log\(''EN namespaces:'', enKeys.length, enKeys.join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''AR namespaces:'', arKeys.length, arKeys.join\('', ''\)\); const missing = enKeys.filter\(k => !arKeys.includes\(k\)\); const extra = arKeys.filter\(k => !enKeys.includes\(k\)\); if \(missing.length\) console.log\(''Missing in AR:'', missing\); if \(extra.length\) console.log\(''Extra in AR:'', extra\); if \(!missing.length && !extra.length\) console.log\(''Namespace parity OK''\);")

Bash(node -e 'const en = require\(""./apps/next/src/messages/en.json""\); const ar = require\(""./apps/next/src/messages/ar.json""\); const enKeys = Object.keys\(en\); const arKeys = Object.keys\(ar\); console.log\(""EN namespaces:"", enKeys.length, enKeys.join\("", ""\)\); console.log\(""AR namespaces:"", arKeys.length, arKeys.join\("", ""\)\); const missing = enKeys.filter\(k => !arKeys.includes\(k\)\); const extra = arKeys.filter\(k => !enKeys.includes\(k\)\); if \(missing.length\) console.log\(""Missing in AR:"", missing\); if \(extra.length\) console.log\(""Extra in AR:"", extra\); if \(!missing.length && !extra.length\) console.log\(""Namespace parity OK""\);')
